title: Zoni's I Love Gambling
description: Let's go gambling! Aw dang it...
body:
[![alt text](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/aa8962f9-e6ff-4a83-8eeb-d145d3c55343.webp) ](https://bisecthosting.com/Zoni25)

Experience high-stakes fun in Minecraft with this innovative Gambling Mod, in I Love Gambling fortune and misfortune are just a spin away!
Craft Chips by combining emeralds with iron nuggets, then wager them on the all-new Slot Machine block — a fully interactive gambling feature that brings a touch of Las Vegas into your survival or creative worlds or servers.

The odds may be stacked against you, but with perseverance, a steady supply of resources, and a bit of daring luck, you just might land the coveted Jackpot!

All winnings are determined via Minecraft loot tables, giving you complete creative control: craft your own datapack to tailor rewards, adjust rarity, or even design entirely new prize pools.

While the slot machine is the star attraction, the mod is built to expand — additional casino games are planned for future updates, each with unique mechanics and customizable payouts, ensuring endless replay value for risk-takers and thrill-seekers alike.

Commands
showplayerstats: Shows the total tries and wins, alongside a win rate.

Stay connected with the development, share your ideas, report issues, and be part of the growing community by joining our official Discord server:
https://discord.com/invite/KWGakdBVwG
